prompt: Design a 50Ah NMC811 prismatic cell for electric vehicle

steps.name: LLM Generate
steps.raw_data:
```yaml
_meta:
  cell_type: prismatic
  design_intent: "50Ah NMC811 EV cell"

envelope:
  external:
    cell_height_mm: 108.0
    cell_width_mm: 220.0
    cell_thickness_mm: 26.0
  walls:
    wall_top_mm: 2.0
    wall_bottom_mm: 1.0
    wall_front_back_mm: 0.5
    wall_sides_mm: 0.7

stack_config:
  architecture:
    num_stacks: 2
    electrode_pairs_per_stack: 26
    end_electrode_config: "BothNegative"
  sheet_geometry:
    cathode_height_mm: 95.0
    cathode_width_mm: 206.0
    anode_offset_top_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_bottom_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_left_mm: 2.0
    anode_offset_right_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_top_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_bottom_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_left_mm: 2.0
    separator_offset_right_mm: 2.0

electrochemistry:
  cathode:
    material_name: "NMC811"
    loading_mg_cm2: 24.4
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 198.0
    collector_thickness_um: 12.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 61.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 62.5
    porosity_pct: 24.0
  anode:
    material_name: "Graphite"
    loading_mg_cm2: 8.7
    rev_spec_capacity_mahg: 355.0
    collector_thickness_um: 8.0
    coating_thickness_0pct_um: 76.0
    coating_thickness_100pct_um: 81.0
    porosity_pct: 33.0
    np_ratio: 1.35
  separator:
    material_name: "Ceramic-coated PP"
    thickness_um: 14.0
    porosity_pct: 42.0
    areal_weight_mgcm2: 1.2
  electrolyte:
    material_name: "LiPF6 in EC:EMC"
    salt_concentration_m: 1.2
    density_g_cm3: 1.23
    excess_factor: 1.05

current_collection:
  tabs:
    cathode:
      material: "Aluminum"
      height_mm: 34.0
      width_mm: 44.0
      thickness_mm: 0.3
    anode:
      material: "Copper"
      height_mm: 34.0
      width_mm: 40.0
      thickness_mm: 0.2

packaging:
  housing:
    case_material: "Aluminum"
    case_density_g_cm3: 2.7
    lid_thickness_mm: 2.0
  insulation:
    shell_thickness_um: 120.0
    shell_count: 2
    fixing_tape_width_mm: 30.0
    fixing_tape_count: 4
```
